docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CONDES, ROLANDO T. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
